title: Shearable Iron Golems
description: A simple quality of life mod that enables shearing the iron golem vines. You can also place them back at any time or let them naturally regrow.
body:
Introducing Shearable Iron Golems, a simple quality of life mod that enables shearing the iron golem vines. It also gives you the ability to place back the vines at any time or let them naturally regrow.

### FEATURES - Shearing Iron Golems drops a single Vine and features a clean vine-less texture - Does not add new entities, instead bakes a new texture on the existing one - Has compatibility with most mods adding custom Shears - Can add back the vines by right-clicking them on a sheared Iron Golem - Natural Vine regrowth can be disabled via a config file
